testcase.name: [1.1:22] Validar que el campo lobby es obligatorio
testcase.system-out:
17:55:40.332 [main] DEBUG com.intuit.karate.Suite - [config] classpath:karate-config.js 17:55:41.955 [main] INFO com.intuit.karate - karate.env system property was: null 17:55:42.591 [main] DEBUG com.intuit.karate - request: 1 > POST https://c03bd4ncki.execute-api.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/dev/lobbies/filter 1 > Content-Type: application/json; charset=UTF-8 1 > Content-Length: 12 1 > Host: c03bd4ncki.execute-api.us-west-2.amazonaws.com 1 > Connection: Keep-Alive 1 > User-Agent: Apache-HttpClient/4.5.14 (Java/17.0.12) 1 > Accept-Encoding: gzip,deflate {"lobby":""}

testcase.name: [2:26] Validar respuesta exitosa cuando el lobby es válido
testcase.system-out:
17:55:43.983 [main] INFO com.intuit.karate - karate.env system property was: null 17:55:43.986 [main] DEBUG com.intuit.karate - request: 1 > POST https://c03bd4ncki.execute-api.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/dev/lobbies/filter 1 > Content-Type: application/json; charset=UTF-8 1 > Content-Length: 42 1 > Host: c03bd4ncki.execute-api.us-west-2.amazonaws.com 1 > Connection: Keep-Alive 1 > User-Agent: Apache-HttpClient/4.5.14 (Java/17.0.12) 1 > Accept-Encoding: gzip,deflate {"lobby":"Lobby Todos Los Juegos Desktop"}

{"success":true,"message":"Success","data":[{"key":"paymentMechanics","type":"multiselect","order":1,"items":[{"key":"OPT_game_type_anywhere","value":"Anywhere","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_game_type_normal","value":"Normal","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_game_type_ways_megaways","value":"Ways Win","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_game_type_bingoslot","value":"Bingoslot","enabled":true}]},{"key":"providers","type":"multiselect","order":2,"items":[{"key":"CT Interactive","value":"CT Interactive","enabled":true},{"key":"Pragmatic","value":"Pragmatic","enabled":true},{"key":"Red Tiger","value":"Red Tiger","enabled":true},{"key":"Bragg (Oryx)","value":"Bragg Global (Microgaming)","value":"Games Global (Microgaming)","enabled":true},{"key":"Zitro","value":"Zitro","enabled":true},{"key":"Wazdan","value":"Wazdan","enabled":true},{"key":"Synot","value":"Synot","enabled":true},{"key":"Ezugi","value":"Ezugi","enabled":true},{"key":"Endorphina","value":"Endorphina","enabled":true},{"key":"Hacksaw","value":"Hacksaw","enabled":true},{"key":"Playson","value":"Playson","enabled":true},{"key":"Spribe","value":"Spribe","enabled":true},{"key":"Platipus","value":"Platipus","enabled":true},{"key":"Gamomat","value":"Gamomat","enabled":true},{"key":"BGaming","value":"BGaming","enabled":true},{"key":"1x2 Digital IGT","enabled":true},{"key":"7777 Gaming","value":"7777 Gaming","enabled":true},{"key":"RubyPlay","value":"RubyPlay","enabled":true},{"key":"3 Oaks","value":"3 Oaks","enabled":true}]},{"key":"jackpotTypes","type":"multiselect","order":3,"items":[{"key":"OPT_jackpot_type_compartido","value":"Compartido","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_jackpot_type_standalone","value":"Standalone","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_jackpot_type_compartido_mundial","value":"Compartido Mundial","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_jackpot_type_compartido_juego","value":"Compartido Juego","enabled":true}]},{"key":"attractions","type":"multiselect","order":4,"items":[{"key":"OPT_atraccion_risk_gamble","value":"Risk Gamble","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_atraccion_Symbol_Multipliers","value":"Symbol Multipliers","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_atraccion_compra_atraccion","value":"Compra Atraccion","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_atraccion_expanding_wild","value":"Expanding Wild","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_atraccion_random_wilds","value":"Random Wilds","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_atraccion_wild_multiplicador","value":"Wild Multiplicador","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_atraccion_simbolos_stack","value":"Simbolos Stack","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_atraccion_collect","value":"Collect","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_atraccion_respin","value":"Respin","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_atraccion_sticky_wild","value":"Sticky Wild","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_atraccion_multiple_grids","value":"Multiple Grids","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_atraccion_apuesta_aumentada","value":"Apuesta Aumentada","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_atraccion_cascada","value":"Cascada","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_atraccion_colossal_symbols","value":"Colossal Symbols","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_atraccion_Mystery_Symbols","value":"Mystery Symbols","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_atraccion_increasing_multipliers","value":"Increasing Multipliers","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_atraccion_hold_and_win","value":"Hold And Win","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_atraccion_roaming_wilds","value":"Roaming Wilds","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_atraccion_expanding_symbol","value":"Expanding Symbol","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_atraccion_progressive_free_spins","value":"Progressive Free Spins","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_atraccion_simbolos_altos","value":"Simbolos Altos","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_atraccion_pago_ambos_sentidos","value":"Pago Ambos Sentidos","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_atraccion_Expanding_Reels","value":"Expanding Reels","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_atraccion_wheel_of_fortune","value":"Wheel Of Fortune","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_atraccion_Compra_Super_Bonus","value":"Compra Super Bonus","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_atraccion_Feature_Spin","value":"Feature Spin","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_atraccion_up_symbol","value":"Up Symbol","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_atraccion_progressive_wilds","value":"Progressive Wilds","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_atraccion_wild_reel_unlock","value":"Wild Reel Unlock","enabled":true}]},{"key":"themes","type":"multiselect","order":5,"items":[{"key":"OPT_theme_animales","value":"Animales","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_theme_aventura","value":"Aventura","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_theme_oriental","value":"Oriental","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_theme_historicos","value":"Historicos","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_theme_mitologia","value":"Mitologia","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_theme_vaquero","value":"Vaquero","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_theme_buffalo","value":"Buffalo","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_theme_frutas","value":"Frutas","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_theme_festividades","value":"Festividades","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_theme_gemas","value":"Gemas","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_theme_dioses","value":"Dioses","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_theme_terror","value":"Terror","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_theme_dulce","value":"Dulce","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_theme_egipto","value":"Egipto","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_theme_tesoros","value":"Tesoros","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_theme_fiesta","value":"Fiesta","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_theme_dragones","value":"Dragones","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_theme_magia","value":"Magia","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_theme_irlandes","value":"Irlandes","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_theme_joker","value":"Joker","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_theme_deportes","value":"Deportes","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_theme_casino_clasico","value":"Casino Clasico","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_theme_pesca","value":"Pesca","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_theme_espacial","value":"Espacial","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_theme_tierno","value":"Tierno","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_theme_mina","value":"Mina","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_theme_animados","value":"Animados","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_theme_piratas","value":"Piratas","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_theme_batallas","value":"Batallas","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_theme_dados","value":"Dados","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_theme_futuro","value":"Futuro","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_theme_policias","value":"Policias","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_theme_arcade","value":"Arcade","enabled":true}]},{"key":"bettingRange","type":"range","order":6,"items":{"min":0.02,"max":15000}},{"key":"volatilities","type":"multiselect","order":7,"items":[{"key":"OPT_vol_high","value":"High","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_vol_medium","value":"Medium","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_vol_very_high","value":"Very High","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_vol_low","value":"Low","enabled":true}]}]}

High","enabled":true},{"key":"OPT_vol_low","value":"Low","enabled":true}]}]}

testcase.name: [4.1:78] [102734] Validar envio de atributo "lobby" como valor de lobby existente
